title: Trichotosia mollis
taxonomy: Trichotosia mollis is classified within the family Orchidaceae. This family consists of approximately 30,000 species, commonly known as orchids, making it the largest flowering plant family. The genus Trichotosia is a group of orchids native to tropical Asia. Trichotosia mollis specifically belongs to the subtribe Aeridinae, which is a subcategory within the Orchidaceae family. The classification of Trichotosia mollis is further detailed in botanical nomenclature.
uses: Trichotosia mollis, also known as the soft orchid, has been traditionally used in some cultures for its medicinal properties.
